case_title: TANAKA, TSUYUMI VS GABOR, ATTILA JUHASZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,350.00 FILED BY TANAKA, TSUYUMI AS TO DEFENDANT GABOR, ATTILA JUHASZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANAKA, TSUYUMI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GABOR, ATTILA JUHASZ $4,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,415.00, DEFENDANT TO PAY PLFT EVERY OTHER WEDNESDAY. DEFT TO PAY BY MONEY ORDER OR CASHIERS CHECK. DEFT TO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
